response.reasoning: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience, well exceeding the 6+ year requirement. Strong TypeScript/Node.js background at re:cinq (current role), Optilyz, and RIDE Capital. React experience at Optilyz. MongoDB and AWS experience present. Current role explicitly mentions AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, matching the AI agent development requirement. Strong testing/TDD background (Fluent-Asserts, Trial, Selenium course, TDD at RIDE). Docker/Kubernetes knowledge from GISCollective. Git proficiency clear. Gaps: no explicit Nest.js mention, no Vitest mention (uses other test frameworks), Kotlin not mentioned (Java is). Resume header name 'Aisha Okonkwo' conflicts with contact details and links pointing to Szabo Bogdan — likely a data inconsistency but the substantive work history is consistent and verifiable via links. Bachelor's in CS satisfies education requirement. Overall a very strong fit on stack, seniority, and AI-agent experience.
strengths: 10+ years full-stack with TypeScript/Node.js/React/MongoDB/AWS matching primary stack
Active AI-agent and MCP tooling experience at current role — rare and directly relevant
Strong TDD/testing culture: built test frameworks, ran TDD/Selenium courses, trunk-based CI/CD experience
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed (uses adjacent tools)
Kotlin not mentioned in skills or work history (Java present but limited)
Name/identity mismatch between resume header and contact links suggests possible data quality issue to clarify

key_factors.factor: Seniority and breadth: 10+ years, staff-level roles, strong engineering practices
Missing specific framework experience (Nest.js, Vitest, Kotlin)

response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the experience bar and aligns tightly with the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS) while bringing the rarer AI-agent/MCP capability the role calls out. Gaps on Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin are framework-level and bridgeable given the depth of full-stack and multi-language experience demonstrated. The name/contact inconsistency is worth clarifying but does not undermine the documented track record.
